creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Caveat: My normal IDE is vi, so take this testing with a grain of salt.

I've test-build intellij 24.2.4, run it and tried:

Learn/Get started/Marketplace/Introduction to Python

As far as I can see, this does not work. Some window opens and closes and
I'm back at the start.

Another test was:

Plugins/IdeaVim/install/Additional Info/Source Code/

If I click on "Source Code", nothing happens ?

As I did not test the original port 2020.2.3, I have no idea what should work
and what did not work their either.
